posts.cookedHtml:
plz help …
im long time try to solve this issue

i got a bord that i keep track with all my clients
and im updating status when they move forowd

when status is X monday will send webhook to Zapier

format
“{item name} - close”

how can i do it !?
plz !!
im so long in this problem !!

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @elad-sasi,

Welcome to the community!

We have a dedicated developer community (called monday Apps & Developers) where you should be able to find help! I changed the “category” of your post so it is in the right queue there

Best,
Rachel
